channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: St. John's to honor late coach Lou Carnesecca at men's and women's games this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The men's and women's basketball teams at St. John's will wear “Lou” patches on their uniform jerseys for the rest of this season to honor Hall of Fame coach Lou Carnesecca, who died Saturday at age 99. A funeral mass at St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nick Rimando elected to National Soccer Hall of Fame
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Former Real Salt Lake goalkeeper Nick Rimando has been elected to the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Rimando will be enshrined with the Class of 2025 on May 3, 2025 in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Analysis: Getting benched may have been best thing that happened to Bryce Young, Anthony Richardson
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Getting benched may have been the best thing that happened to Bryce Young and Anthony Richardson. Both second-year quarterbacks are playing well since returning to the starting lineup.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Father of ex-Cowboys star Leighton Vander Esch arrested for attempted strangulation, police say
item.description: Former Dallas Cowboys star Leighton Vander Esch's father was arrested in Idaho early Sunday morning on charges of attempted strangulation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USWNT beats Netherlands 2-1 in goalkeeper Alyssa Naeher's final match
item.description: Alyssa Naher made two critical saves in her final match for the United States, Lynn Williams scored the go-ahead goal in the 71st minute and the Americans beat the Netherlands 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: RFK Jr asks Aaron Rodgers about getting into politics in Netflix docuseries trailer
item.description: Robert J. Kennedy Jr. was seen asking New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers if he considered getting into politics during a trailer for Rodgers' upcoming Netflix docuseries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR recovers from early washouts to produce decent racing in season marred by antitrust lawsuit
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — NASCAR opened the season with near washouts in the first two races of the year that could have set the tone for a miserable 2024 campaign.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trans female weightlifter takes USA Powerlifting lawsuit to Minnesota Supreme Court
item.description: A transgender powerlifter has taken a yearslong case of discrimination to the Minnesota Supreme Court, with opening arguments beginning on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Transgender powerlifter asks Minnesota Supreme Court to let her compete in women's events
item.description: Attorneys for a transgender athlete have urged the Minnesota Supreme Court to allow her to compete in the women's division at powerlifting events, saying she’s protected against discrimination by the Minnesota Human Rights Act.
item.dc:creator: Steve Karnowski, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bay Area native, ex-49ers assistant Mike Holmgren picked as Hall of Fame finalist along with Sharpe
item.description: Holmgren coached at three Bay Area high schools and San Francisco State before climbing to the NFL ranks, where he won two Super Bowls as a 49ers assistant and another as the coach of the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Talks on a new NHL CBA are set to start early next year. Here's why there is optimism
item.description: The NHL's collective bargaining agreement does not expire until Sept. 15, 2026. That discussions are set to begin on a new deal in early 2025 is already one step ahead of where hockey has been in labor negotiations in the past.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods has no firm answers on a deal with Saudis or his future as a player
item.description: Tiger Woods could not offer much of a timetable Tuesday on PGA Tour negotiations with the Saudi backers of LIV Golf or his own future as a player. Woods is the tournament host of the Hero World Challenge this week, and that's his only role at Albany Golf Club in the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fueled by boos, Browns receiver Jerry Jeudy turns in 235-yard performance in return to Denver
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The boos only brought out the best in Jerry Jeudy as he returned to Denver. "They only boo you,” Jeudy reasoned, “when they know there’s something great in you.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryggs Johnston goes from a tiny Montana town to Australian Open champion: Analysis
item.description: A pair of Americans delivered command performances halfway around the world during Thanksgiving week. One was Peter Uihlein, the former U.S. Amateur champion and two-time Walker Cup player, winning by five shots in Qatar on the Asian Tour.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Religious beliefs put two captains in spotlight during Premier League's Rainbow Laces campaign
item.description: The captains of two Premier League teams are in the spotlight for their choices as the competition celebrates LGBTQ+ inclusion in its campaign to promote equality and diversity.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: McCaffrey injury potentially rules him out for rest of season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Trent Williams' wife annouces passing of newborn son
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers star left tackle Trent Williams' newborn son passed away last week, his wife Sondra announced on Instagram. Trenton O'Brien Williams Jr. died on the night of Nov. 24. Trenton was born prematurely as Sondra gave birth to her son after 35 weeks of pregnancy.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Texas safety Michael Taaffe honors Jake Ehlinger, 'feels sorry' for fan who made sign mocking death
item.description: Taaffe had strong, passionate comments regarding a sign held up by a fan in the crowd for ESPN's College Gameday, broadcasting from the Texas A&M campus the morning before the big game.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Rays' leadership, Pinellas commission at odds over new stadium
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays' future in St. Petersburg remains in doubt, as team leadership and Pinellas County commissioners are at odds over the plans for a new stadium.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes close disappointing season with 28-14 victory
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah forced three turnovers and scored two defensive touchdowns Friday night, including a 60-yard pick-6 by Zemaiah Vaughn, as the Utes snapped a seven-game losing streak with a 28-14 victory over UCF.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU knocks off NC State in third place game, 72-61
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU got back in the win column with a 72-61 win over NC State on Thursday afternoon at the Rady Children’s Invitational at LionTree Arena in San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Former Tennessee head coach Bill Battle dies at 82
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (WATE) -- Former University of Tennessee Coach William "Bill" Battle III died on Thanksgiving morning at the age of 82, according to the university.
item.dc:creator: Hope McAlee, NewsNation

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: NFL football on Thanksgiving
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Dallas Cowboys ended a six-game home losing streak with a 27-20 victory over the New York Giants on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Tom Wilson's power-play goal lifts the Capitals over the Lightning 5-4
item.description: Tom Wilson scored a power-play goal with 3:26 left in regulation to lift the Washington Capitals to a 5-4 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Orlando takes on Chicago, aims for 4th straight win
item.description: Chicago Bulls (8-11, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Orlando Magic (12-7, third in the Eastern Conference) Orlando, Florida; Wednesday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson not interested in bright spots with team's skid at 5 games going into Thanksgiving
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — Jaylon Johnson wasn't all that interested in discussing any bright spots or reasons to have hope for the Bears. The star cornerback made his feelings clear.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Vucevic and White lead Bulls to 127-108 win over Wizards, losers of 12 straight
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 19 points and grabbed 12 rebounds as the Chicago Bulls eased to a 127-108 victory over the struggling Washington Wizards on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
